pages.title: 1. Build Your Factory Inside a Compact Machine
pages.text: $(li)Place a Compact Machine block in the world $(li)Right-click with Personal Shrinking Device to enter $(li)Build your factory inside (example: furnace with chests)$(br2)$(bold)Example Simple Factory$(): [Chest] → [Furnace] → [Chest]

pages.title: 2. Place Importer and Exporter Blocks
pages.text: $(bold)Importers$() receive resources from the Overworld: $(li)Actively push items into adjacent inventories$(br2)$(bold)Exporters$() send resources to the Overworld: $(li)Actively pull items from adjacent inventories$(br2)$(bold)Example (With Chests - Recommended)$(): [Importer #1] → [Chest] → [Furnace input] [Furnace output] → [Chest] → [Exporter #1] Tip: $(bold)Best practice$(): Use intermediate chests for more reliable systems$(br2)Tip: $(bold)Tip$(): Importers/Exporters have unique IDs - you'll see them in the PreFab GUI later

pages.title: 3. Upgrade the Compact Machine to a PreFab
pages.text: $(li)Exit the CM dimension (right-click Personal Shrinking Device) $(li)Hold the PreFab Upgrade Template item $(li)Right-click the Compact Machine block $(li)The CM becomes a PreFab (block texture changes)

pages.title: 4. Configure PreFab Faces
pages.text: $(li)Hold the Simulation Wrench $(li)Right-click the PreFab $(li)The Face Configuration GUI opens$(br2)$(bold)For each face you want to use$(): $(li)Select a face (North, South, East, West, Up, Down) $(li)Set $(bold)Mode$(): $(li)`PULL` - Extract from Overworld → Send to Importer $(li)`PUSH` - Extract from Exporter → Send to Overworld $(li)`DISABLED` - Face inactive $(li)Set $(bold)Resource Filter$(): $(li)`ITEMS` - Transfer items only $(li)`FLUIDS` - Transfer fluids only (future) $(li)`ENERGY` - Transfer energy only (future) $(li)`ALL` - Transfer all resource types $(li)Set $(bold)Target$(): $(li)Select the Importer or Exporter from dropdown $(li)The dropdown shows all Importers/Exporters in the CM dimension$(br2)$(bold)Example configuration$(): NORTH face: PULL ITEMS → Importer #1 (coal input) SOUTH face: PUSH ITEMS ← Exporter #1 (iron output) All other faces: DISABLED

pages.title: 5. Connect Overworld Chests
pages.text: Place chests next to the PreFab faces you configured: $(li)PULL faces: Chest must have input materials $(li)PUSH faces: Chest receives output products$(br2)$(bold)Example$(): [Coal Chest] → [PreFab NORTH face] [PreFab SOUTH face] → [Iron Ingot Chest]

pages.title: 6. Start Simulation (Calibration)
pages.text: $(li)With empty hand or any item (No Simulation Wrench) $(li)Right-click PreFab $(li)PreFab enters `SIMULATING` state $(li)CM chunks load (factory actually runs) $(li)PreFab measures production rates$(br2)$(bold)What's happening$(): $(li)Resources flow from input chest → Importer → Furnace $(li)Products flow from Furnace → Exporter → Output chest $(li)PreFab counts how many items/tick are transported $(li)Wait 30-60 seconds for accurate measurement

pages.title: 7. Finish Simulation (Enter CACHED Mode)
pages.text: $(li)Right-click PreFab with Simulation Wrench again $(li)PreFab calculates production rates $(li)PreFab enters `CACHED` state $(li)$(bold)CM chunks unload$() (performance gain)

pages.title: 8. Watch It Run
pages.text: Your factory now runs "virtually": $(li)Add coal and iron ore to input chests $(li)Iron ingots appear in output chest $(li)CM dimension chunks stay unloaded $(li)Check with F3 screen (chunk count should be lower)$(br2)$(bold)Rate example$(): $(li)If simulation measured 0.213 iron/tick $(li)PreFab will push 1 iron every ~4.7 ticks $(li)This matches real furnace production without loading chunks.
